transcript.text:
(Today's game)
('Build up the sushi plates' game!)
(Her scores are ceaselessly going up...)
(What will be her final score?)
(Well, one thing for sure...)
(Is that she definitely ate more than 100 plates)
(Welcome to an unbelievable sushi train mukbang that seems like a game...!)
(It's sprinkling today)
(In front of Seoul station exit 5)
Hello everyone
I came near Seoul station today
I came to eat at a sushi train restaurant!
It's around the Seoul station area
so it's very popular among the office workers here
(You just wait...!) It's been a while since I had sushi train!
(Located in Yonsei Severance Building, Seoul)

('Hae Rang Sushi')
1,600 won for a plate? That's cheap!
(17,000 won for 10 basic plates) It's 1,700 won for a plate
But from the 11th plate, it's 1,600 won per plate
(Entering the restaurant) Hello
(Being loved as soon as she goes in) You're so pretty!
Oh, thank you haha
(Scanning!) The menu looks unusual
We're a little different from the usual sushi train restaurants
So if you come in, you have to eat 10 plates
Afterwards, we give you a discount
so it's 1,600 won per plate from then
The dishes you see on the left
are the dishes on the rail
so you can just take them down to eat them
The majority of the dishes on the right

are the dishes that need grilling
so if you want them, you can write each one down
(And put them in a basket...??) As you can see, there are baskets
(This is the basket!)
(Highly recommended by the owner) The 'futomaki' became famous
thanks to [Extraordinary Attorney Woo], and it's really tasty
It's so big, so they say you'll get blessed if you can eat it in one bite
(Practicing right away)
(Tzuyang's 'one bite' challenge is to be continued...)
(End of the owner's kind explanation!) If you like these, you can order them!
When I walked in today, one of our staff said
that he's too excited, that he can't work
Then he ran to the grocery store to buy the green plum drink she likes
(3 bottles??) He bought 3 bottles of them
(He even prepared the glass...LOL) He's prepared a massive glass too
- (Touched...) - He said he'll fill it up with ice

(He really wanted to see Tzuyang...) Manager! Manager Jeong!
(He's coming...)
Thank you, I'll enjoy the green plum drink you prepared for me!
I think she'll eat... about 110 plates today...
(The number of plates he guessed...) Yes, 110 plates? Okay
- I'm guessing 150 plates lol - 150?
About 120-130 plates...?
(She wants to live up to the expectation) I suddenly feel pressured...
Please enjoy the food in moderation! Please don't go overboard
Okay
(Every sushi train mukbang became legendary...)
(One again, Tzuyang will give her very best today)
(Here's the futomaki, the highlight of this zone!)
(How many plates will Tzuyang be able to eat today...?)
(Her first pick) I'll start with fried tofu with rice!
I'll start with the plates on the rails, and then order the other ones later

(Her second pick) Sea eel!
Conch with mayonnaise
Salmon sushi
There's someone who really likes you, who wants to see you just once haha
(A subscriber appeared looking shy!) Hello
You look even prettier in person!
Thank you
(Taking a photo in the same pose...!)
Don't you... always eat 100 plates?
(Her average is too high...) About 100 plates
I always decide what I'll eat by looking at what you eat
Really?
(They met here like it was destiny...) Thank you
- Thank you! Enjoy your food! - Thank you! Enjoy your food!
That's the futomaki!!!
Finally seeing it in person...!!

How can someone eat this in one bite...? Does that make sense?
You probably can't imagine how big this is...
It's the size of my fist
It's bigger than my fist
Is it possible to eat this in one bite?
(Picked an egg sushi!) Done! I'll start eating first
Bon appétit
I'll start with the egg sushi as the appetizer!
I'll dip it lightly in the soy sauce
Oh, the egg
is a little sweet, so it's very soft
It's like a custard cake...
(+ The first plate of honor)
The egg sushi tastes so good already!
(The aforementioned drink gift is here!) Ou cook has prepared this for you
(He prepared the drink & the cup) The green plum drink? Thank you

(Thank you! I really appreciate it!) Just let us know if you need more
Thank you!
Wow!
Next, I'll try what the owner recommended me earlier
Conch with mayonaise? Is this conch with mayonniase?
You know when you go to sushi restaruants,
they have really tasty garlic shrimps
Just like those, this conch with mayonniase sushi tastes really good
(It's the best combination) The chewy conch goes well with it
The food here is delicious!
(Sea eel sushi)
Fried tofu with rice!
I really like fried tofu with rice, I wonder what it will taste like....!
Wow, it's really yummy...!
It's the moist fried tofu with rice that I like
The fried tofu itself with really sweet and tasty

(+ Finished 5 plates already)
(The next target) How can one each this in one bite?
It's very thick as well, it's thick
(It covers up both her eyes) Take a look, it's very heavy
(It's massive) It's this big LOL
(She'll take a moment to practice....lol)
Is there anyone... who eats this in one shot??
- There are lots of people who do - Really?
I eat it over 3 bites
(The owner is giving her advice...) You can take a bite, and another bite
(so Tzuyang doesn't overstrain...) Then gather them up, and eat it again
(But owner, I want to be blessed...) Because people say I can be blessed...
(Let's do this! To receive blessings!)
Cut it there! No, no!
Cut it there!
(It seems to be too big...)

Oh no LOL
(She did it...!!!!) It went in, oh no LOL
(How is... this... possible....?)
(Oh... She was genuine about this...)
It's so yummy...!
If you think about it, this isn't really gimbap
But among all the gimbaps I've had,
this is one of the best! It's really good!
There's a big variety of tastes
(Various ingredients harmonize) It's very flavorful too
(and open up a tasty festival...!) It's so yummy!
But... I did it!
(Finished 9 plates in a blink!)
It's really good
(She'll try ordering the dishes now!) I'll try ordering with this now
I'll get a sea eel

and shrimp with mayonniase
(2 pollack roe salmon, 2 fresh flatfish, fried onion with salmon, salmon belly)
(Soy sauce shrimp, flatfish fin, butter-grilled scallop, beef steak, freshwater eel)
(About this many for now? Hehe) I'll eat these
The basket!
(I'm on my way)
(Finished ordering)
(Mitre squid / Conch with mayonnaise / fresh fish)
How are they all so tasty?
(Cleared 13 plates!)
(What should I eat next?)
Pollack roe with salmon
I'll have another one...
It's really good!
(+ another plate)
(The dishes Tzuyang ordered are being served!)

Thank you
It looks great!
(Starting with the fried onion with salmon sushi!)
It tastes really good
It's cripsy
and flavorful
(She means it tastes really good lol) The taste of mayonnaise is crazy!
This is the beef steak sushi!
(More plates of sushi are being served...)
(There's more to come on top of this...?)
(Packed)
(Also recommended by the owner!) She said the soy sauce shrimp is good
It's so yummy!
They even give you the head
Wow, this soy sauce shrimp tastes legit so good!
(As she was eating away... all the sushi happily...)

I knew it!
(She endlessly ate and stacked, ate and stacked...)
There are 20 plates here!
(That will make 100 plates) I'll just have to make 5 of these then
Let me see if any tasty dishes will pass by
This is our new dish
It's called cream cheese rice balls
This one?
Thank you!
(Even from the first glance, you know that this will taste good...!)
(Let's try the new dish!) Bacon!
It has cream sauce on it
It's hot
It tastes so good
(Please wipe off the sauce on your face... LOL)
It tastes really good

It's.. like...
Inside the fried layer,
it has very chewy rice, like glutinous rice!
But it goes really well with this cream sauce too
(13 plates / 20 plates) It's crazy!
I think it's time to order again
(Very serious about this)
(Shooting it into the basket again!)
(Dear cook... May the order be with you...)
If you like croquettes, we fry them on the spot
(She recommended another dish!) The sauce tastes really good
- Put the sauce on top & enjoy it! - Thank you!
Oh, they all taste really good...
This is a potato croquette with fluffy filling inside
This is crazy
Wow, even the onions taste really good!

I'll add plenty on top
(Need more of this!!) I want to eat another one!
(First of all, please receive the sushi you ordered)
Thank you!
(It's not over yet...lol)
(Still not over yet...)
(And there's more...) There are heaps
(There's no space to put them now...) Wait, what do I do about the dishes?
(Making space) Should I stack them up here?
(Rearranging...)
If they feel too fatty or oily,
(Recommended by the owner!) It's like spicy seasoned conch!
Thank you!
(Dear owner, you're the best...) She gives great recommendations
(Appetitzing plates of sushi have been set up again)
(Tzuyang will be okay, right...?) She'll be okay, right?

(Totally fine)
(The plates built up endlessly...) This place has great food
(+ 59th plate now)
(Suddenly served with pineapples...?) Really?
- Yes, this tastes really good - Thank you!
(2nd gift from the plum drink staff) The cook ran to go buy this
Really?
(Please tell him she said thank you!) Thank you!
(Tzuyang became very happy...) Oh my, I really like pineapples
I'm so grateful!
It's really sweet!
(I need to calm down) I can only have 1, I need to save them
(Hey, hey, calm down) I'll just have one
(The croquette she ordered is here!)
(It must've tasted so good, she ordered this many...)
(Let me see, she ate about...) By herself?

I think she ate about 70 plates...!!
Everything here tastes good!
I think even the people who usually eat 10 plates
would eat about 15 plates when they come here
(She quickly finished the croquettes)
(The futomaki appeared again)
But seriously LOL
No matter how many times I see this, I can't get used to the size of it!
(And... more plates of sushi are being served...)
He's the cook who bought the pineapple from earlier
(Thank you for the pineapple gift too) Thank you, it tasted really good
(Anyway, check out this futomaki...) It's really big!
(Warming up her mouth)
(Oh, will she fail this time?)
(Nope, she succeeded with her two cheeks puffed up!)
(The futomaki is so big that it takes ages to eat it...)

(But as long as it tastes good, it's fine) It's yummy...
It is really hard to eat it,
but it tastes really good
(Cleared 69 plates) It tastes so good!
Should I order in lumps again?
(Popping it in the basket!)
(Hopping along...)
(The fried shrimps & cheese stick are here!)
(Cold udon is also here)
Cold udon!
(The cold udon disappeared without a break...)
Trying the fried shrimp this time...!)
It's yummy!
I thought it'd be
the fried shrimp with bread crumbs, so I didn't have high hopes for it
But the fried layer is very thin

This fried shrimp tastes better than I expected!
(Dipping it in sweet chili sauce!) Shrimp with chili sauce
(Amazing skills of pulling out only the tail)
Next is the cheese stick!
(To prevent this video from becoming too long...)
(We'll fast forward a little bit...)
(Because she's going to order again lol) I'll just order one more time!
(Will she really eat 110 plates...?)
These are rice balls, and they taste really good
(She's currently working on her 88th plate...)
(More... more... more...)
(There's no more space now...)
(We made it for her, but this is really fascinating, right...?)
3 people came and ate 120 plates!
(The highest record so far!) That would've been the highest record
(The owner said 20 plates is plenty...) I could eat a little over 20 plates...

20 plates... alone?
If I didn't come to film, and had come with a hat on,
and if I just walked into a sushi train restuarant
and ate this many dishes alone...
(Absolutely flabbergasting) The owner would've been shocked
(It's completely full here)
(And completely full here too)
I wonder how many plates this would be!
(She tried to calculate it in her mind...)
(But she ended up taking out a calculator on her phone...lol)
(Ate 100 plates, but she continues) 2 pollack roe salmon dishes, please?
(This is very exciting!!!) Thank you!
These are salmon belly pieces
On the belly pieces,
I'll take the pollack roe on this
and put it on

And on
(A genius when it comes to eating)
(So moved, she's having her dance time)
This is crazy
(There's no more space to stack them now...)
There aren't many dishes on the rail now
I just want to order 6 more...
(Let me see...)
(All decided)
(Sea eel sushi & pollack roe with salmon sushi)
(Soy sauce shrimp sushi & fried onion with salmon sushi)
(And conch with mayonnaise too - Finished ordering!)
Everything tasted good, right until the end...!
Soy sauce shrimp! I'll eat the head first
(+ Currently on her 107th plate)
Once again, I've come to think...

That this must be fascinating to other people, right?
(What's with your question...?)
LOL...?
Isn't that obvious?
This is just a part of my daily life
(The thoughtless remark of the day) I never thought this is fascinating
(It's verrrrrry fascinating) I guess it will be fascinating
(A subscriber noticed it's Tzuyang!) Hello, it's an honor to see you
Hello
- 100 plates? - More than 100 plates!
More than 100 plates??
That's amazing...
I felt full after 10 plates...
The final sushi!
It's time for dessert!
(Princess Tzuyang... Has been entrapped in the tower of plates...)

(Finishing up the pineapples)
(Sushi train - All cleared!)
Among all the sushi train restaurants I've been to...
To talk about how satisfied I was...
I think this place would rank top 5? Or top 3 of all the sushi train restaurants
(Anyway, how many plates did she eat...?)
I think it will be hard to count these lol
(Counting them one by one...)
You ate a total of 100 plates
(110 plates...??)
(His prediction was right...) 110 plates
I enjoyed the meal thank to everyone!
Thank you!
Once again, I enjoyed today's meal!
